boundary_binding.action_boundary: Exact current source records close the requested downgrade boundary
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record matches actor, scope, date, and boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect remains; tone and adjacency are irrelevant
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current source-control records

critical_features_preserved: requester role must be billing owner
final_answer: ALLOW. The current control record closes the exact action boundary: requester role is current, exact, and tied to the requested subscription downgrade, with scope and effective date matching the system boundary. Policy says execution may proceed when current source records close the boundary; warning tone and adjacent concerns do not block it.
